category_sources: source_facts.description says grap is a language for typesetting graphs; official homepage describes grap as a language for describing graphs in typeset documents.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is grap and official homepage at https://www.lunabase.org/~faber/Vault/software/grap/ uses Grap/grap.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the primary project documentation surface and links to the GitHub repository README; no separate docs domain was found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage links to https://github.com/snorerot13/grap as the GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe a grap language/preprocessor for typesetting graphs with pic/troff-compatible workflows.
